## Problem

What are you trying to do, and where does boxa get in the way today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen. If it touches the firewall, networking, HTTPS,
agent-browser, or MCP areas, note which.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, prior art, related items on the [ROADMAP](../../ROADMAP.md).
